pi_items.source: Task instructions explicitly say 'select dive #2' and verifier checks for this XML property
Task instructions specify 'Rating ... to 4 out of 5 stars' and verifier enforces this rating value
Task instructions specify 'Visibility ... to 3 out of 5 stars' and verifier enforces this visibility value
setup_task.sh copies the SSRF to this explicit path and the task instructions state it is located there
Python XML parser counts 29 <dive> tags in the official Subsurface SampleDivesV2.ssrf downloaded from github, contradicting the claimed 8 dives

privileged_info_summary: The real SampleDivesV2.ssrf file downloaded from Subsurface's GitHub actually contains 29 dives, contradicting the prompt and metadata claim of 8 dives. The target dive is explicitly #2, with a required rating of 4 stars and a required visibility of 3 stars, located at the verified path /home/ga/Documents/dives.ssrf.
